mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in housing starts signals a strengthening demand for housing and related goods, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A crossing above 4.5% in the federal funds rate signals a tightening monetary cycle that increases discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in payroll employment and decrease in unemployment rate signals a strengthening labor market, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in industrial production signals a strengthening supply chain, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A crossing below 4.0% in the unemployment rate signals a strengthening demand for labor, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A joint increase in the federal funds rate and decrease in the consumer price index signals a tightening monetary cycle that increases discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in tightening periods are not significantly lower than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sustained increase in real gross domestic product signals a strengthening demand for goods and services, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A crossing above 150,000 in payroll employment signals a strengthening labor market, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in expansion periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).
